title: Pasta with Sundried Tomatoes Is the Most Underrated Weeknight Seduction
tags: Dorothy Kalins, the founding editor of Saveur, called them a flavor firecracker.;As DeLallo explains, sun-drying removes most of the water content, concentrating the tomato's flavor into something richer and more robust than fresh tomatoes could ever be.;Slow Cooker Chicken Alfredo is another path to creamy pasta without the panic;The best food experiences, like the best pizza
